scripts.eval:classification: env -u GEMINI_API_KEY GCLOUD_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-access-token) promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class.json
scripts.eval:reasoning: env -u GEMINI_API_KEY GCLOUD_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-access-token) promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason.json
scripts.eval:recommender: env -u GEMINI_API_KEY GCLOUD_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-access-token) promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-recommender.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/recommender.json /tmp/pf-recommender.json
scripts.eval:fresh: env -u GEMINI_API_KEY GCLOUD_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-access-token) promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class.json && env -u GEMINI_API_KEY GCLOUD_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-access-token) promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason.json && env -u GEMINI_API_KEY GCLOUD_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-access-token) promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --no-cache --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-recommender.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/recommender.json /tmp/pf-recommender.json
